rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELERWEASE BRADFORD REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/26/2021. Issues: 1) The petition on schedule c alleges fees from conservatorship of Reable Mathis and elerwease bradford were authorized to be paid from the loan proceeds in the conservatorship of Elerwease Bradford per Order filed 4/1/2020. Please explain and provide legal authority as the 4/1/2020 in PCN-13-296939 order does not authorize this. 2) The account period ends August 31, 2020. Petitioner provided bank statements from 10/15 to 11/06. Please verify the balance at the end of the account period. The ending balance of assets in interim and final accounts filed by fiduciaries, who are not financial institutions, must be verified. [LRSF 14.36 D.] 3) Please file receipts for the following: 1/27/2020 Comcast for $532.95. 6/10/2020 (garbage lien) for $1,622.60 6/12/20 Patricia/Anthony/home health aide for $351.75 6/22/2020 Ross Stores/Clothing for $222.02 6/22/2020 Wal-Mart/Hosuehold needs for $214.66 6/29/2020 Bon Air Shpping Center/Household needs Note: ex parte for increase of bond has not been processed. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 5/10/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HARRYETTE B. NESTEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/26/2021 1) The court disfavors filing a creditor claim with amount to be determined. Please explain why the amount is listed at to be determined it appears on 02/22/2021 the order terminating conservatorship was signed and filed. 2) Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. 3) Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MATTIE B. LYONS REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For: Determination That The Mattie B. Lyons Revocable Trust Is Invalid And Imposition Of Constructive Trust-Undue Influence.
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/26/2021. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PHILIP M. EWING AND MARIAN S. EWING IRREVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Transfer Trust To Another Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Continued again to 6/7/2021. Still no filed response to examiner notes. 1) A petition and account involving a trust must state the names and last known addresses of all vested or contingent beneficiaries, including all persons in being who may or will receive income or corpus of the trust. [CRC 7.902]. 2) Probate Code 17402 The petition for transfer shall set forth all of the following: (b) The names, ages, and places of residence of the living beneficiaries, as far as known to the petitioner. 3) Please explain and provide legal authority for why this petition is before the court. [Probate Code 17209]. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 5/24/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CAROL TIMKO CARGES
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/26/2021 1) Please file a complete copy of the insurance policies including information that shows the beneficaries of the policies. 2) Please explain what it means to be an owner of the policies. 3) Please state the value of the policies. 4) Please file proof community property funds were used. 5) Please file legal authority and explain how a spousal property petition is the proper vehicle to claim assets paid for with community property funds are community property. There appears to be a Will devising the property to a trust. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 5/10/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.]
